product_overview: Backend API for Prognot: an automated 10‑step AI pipeline that ingests long-form video, transcribes and diarizes audio, discovers and evaluates short-form clip candidates, and exports approved landscape and reframed (9:16) clips to Cloudflare R2.
core_goals: Enable creation and orchestration of 10-step video processing jobs that run as background tasks.
Pause pipeline after speaker diarization (S03) and allow explicit user confirmation of speaker roles before resuming.
Produce short-form clips with metadata and two stored renditions (landscape and reframed 9:16) and support an approval workflow.
Surface job and clip state via APIs for polling, inspection, and administrative actions.
Allow channel-level configuration (Channel DNA) to guide AI discovery/evaluation and clip style preferences.

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Liveness endpoint to verify service health and version; useful for readiness probes and quick diagnostics.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with { ok: true, version: "string", environment: "string" }
GET /health -> Receive 200 with { ok: false, version: "string", environment: "string" } when a dependent service (DB or storage) is unavailable (indicates degraded state)

features.name: Job Management
features.description: Create and manage pipeline jobs that run the 10-step processing workflow (S01–S10). Jobs start immediately in background and expose status, progress, and resulting clip counts.
user_flows: POST /jobs with multipart body { video_url: "https://...", video_title: "Test", channel_id: "<uuid>" } -> Receive 201 with { id: "<job_id>", status: "queued", channel_id: "<uuid>", video_title: "Test" }
GET /jobs/{job_id} -> Receive 200 with status="awaiting_speaker_confirm" and predicted_speaker_map present (pipeline paused at S03)
POST /jobs/{job_id}/confirm-speakers with speaker_map -> Receive 200 { status: "resumed" } (pipeline resumes from S04)
GET /jobs/{job_id} -> Receive 200 with status="completed" and clip_count > 0
POST /jobs with missing channel_id in multipart form -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity (validation error)
POST /jobs with invalid or non-existent channel_id -> Receive 404 Channel not found
GET /jobs/{nonexistent_job_id} -> Receive 404 Job not found
POST /jobs/upload-preview with multipart video_file -> Receive 200 with { upload_id: "<id>", preview_url: "https://..." } (upload preview successfully stored)

features.name: Speaker Confirmation
features.description: After S03 speaker identification completes, the pipeline pauses and exposes the predicted_speaker_map. User confirms roles (host/guest and names) to resume the pipeline from S04 onward.
user_flows: GET /jobs/{job_id} -> Receive 200 with status="awaiting_speaker_confirm" and predicted_speaker_map object
POST /jobs/{job_id}/confirm-speakers with body { speaker_map: { "0": { "role": "host", "name": "Joe" }, "1": { "role": "guest", "name": "Alex" } } } -> Receive 200 { status: "resumed" } (happy path)
POST /jobs/{job_id}/confirm-speakers when job status != "awaiting_speaker_confirm" -> Receive 400 Job not in awaiting_speaker_confirm state (error flow)
POST /jobs/{nonexistent_job_id}/confirm-speakers with any payload -> Receive 404 Job not found

features.name: Clip Management
features.description: List, inspect, approve/reject, publish, and fetch transcripts for extracted short-form clips. Clips include metadata, score, content_type, suggested titles/descriptions, and R2 paths for landscape/reframed videos.
user_flows: GET /clips?channel_id=<channel_id>&job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 200 array of clip objects with fields score, content_type, video_landscape_path, video_reframed_path, etc. (happy path listing)
GET /clips?job_id=<job_id> without channel_id -> Receive 422 Missing channel_id (validation error)
GET /clips/{clip_id} -> Receive 200 with full clip metadata including video_landscape_path that starts with "https://" and score between 0-100
GET /clips/{nonexistent_clip_id} -> Receive 404 Clip not found
PATCH /clips/{clip_id}/approve -> Receive 200 { is_successful: true } and subsequent GET /clips/{clip_id} -> Receive 200 with is_successful: true (approve happy path)
PATCH /clips/{clip_id}/reject -> Receive 200 { is_successful: false } and subsequent GET /clips/{clip_id} -> Receive 200 with is_successful: false (reject flow)
PATCH /clips/{clip_id}/unset-approval -> Receive 200 { is_successful: null } (reset approval to pending)
PATCH /clips/{nonexistent_clip_id}/approve -> Receive 404 Clip not found (error flow)
PATCH /clips/{clip_id}/publish -> Receive 200 success (mark as published)
GET /clips/{clip_id}/transcript -> Receive 200 with { words: [...], text: "..." } returning word-level transcript for clip's time range

features.name: Channel Management
features.description: Manage channels and their Channel DNA configuration (tone, content_types, duration_range, do/don't lists) which guide AI discovery and clip preferences.
user_flows: POST /channels with body { name: "My Channel" } -> Receive 201 { id: "<channel_id>", name: "My Channel" } (create channel happy path)
POST /channels with missing name -> Receive 422 Validation error (error flow)
GET /channels -> Receive 200 array of channel objects for authenticated user
PATCH /channels/{channel_id} with body { channel_dna: { duration_range: { min: 30, max: 90 } } } -> Receive 200 updated channel object
GET /channels/{channel_id} -> Receive 200 with { id: "<channel_id>", name: "...", channel_dna: { duration_range: { min: 30, max: 90 } } } (verify DNA applied)
GET /channels/{nonexistent_channel_id} -> Receive 404 Channel not found

tech_stack: Google Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview / 2.5 Flash (AI discovery)

features.name: Job Management
features.description: Create and manage video processing pipeline jobs. Each job runs a 10-step pipeline (audio extract, transcribe, speaker ID, label transcript, AI discovery, AI evaluation, precision cut, export, reframe, captions). Pipeline pauses after S03 for speaker confirmation.

endpoints.description: Create a new pipeline job. Accepts multipart form with video_file OR video_url, plus video_title and channel_id. Pipeline starts immediately as background task.
Get job status and metadata. Status progresses through queued -> processing -> awaiting_speaker_confirm -> cutting -> completed/failed.
Upload a video file for preview before creating a job
Delete a job and all associated clips

features.name: Speaker Confirmation
features.description: After S03 completes, user confirms speaker roles (host/guest). This resumes the pipeline from S04 onward.

endpoints.description: Confirm speaker map and resume pipeline. speaker_map keys are diarization IDs, values have role (host/guest) and name.

features.name: Clip Management
features.description: Access and manage extracted video clips. Each clip has a landscape (16:9) and reframed (9:16) version stored in R2. Clips go through an approval workflow.

endpoints.description: List clips for a channel, optionally filtered by job_id

response_schema.200: array of clip objects with score, content_type, video_landscape_path, etc.

endpoints.description: Get a single clip with full metadata
Mark clip as published to social media
Get word-level transcript for clip's time range

features.name: Channel Management
features.description: Manage YouTube channels and their DNA configuration. Channel DNA defines clip style, tone, content types, and duration preferences used by the AI pipeline.

endpoints.description: List all channels for the user

known_limitations.issue: Pipeline steps require real external API keys (Deepgram, Gemini, Anthropic) — tests that trigger the full pipeline will fail without valid credentials in .env
known_limitations.impact: End-to-end pipeline tests need real API keys to succeed

known_limitations.issue: S09 reframe requires YOLO model file (yolov8n-pose.pt) to be present
known_limitations.impact: Reframe step may fail if model file not downloaded

known_limitations.issue: Video upload endpoint requires a real video file or YouTube URL that is downloadable
known_limitations.impact: Integration tests need a real short video source
